title: Support for Coupon Codes in Marketplace

posts.author: Hillav (Hilla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com team and community,

I’d like to suggest a feature that could bring a lot of value to both app developers and users on the marketplace — the ability to create and manage coupon codes for our apps.
This would allow partners like us to offer discounts to new or existing users in a more flexible and scalable way, whether it’s part of a limited-time promotion, referral program, or partner collaboration.
Being able to generate time-bound or usage-limited coupon codes directly through the marketplace would really help boost adoption, reward loyal customers, and run meaningful marketing campaigns.
Would love to hear if this is something that’s being considered — happy to elaborate or collaborate if helpful!

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hillav, there is already a feature request for this here.

Let’s vote it there.
